title: A NEW INTERFERING AGENT IN SANCHIS TEST FOR FLUORINE
author: T. RAMAKRISHNAN
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The isolation and identification of a material present in a typical vegetable carbon which interferes in Sanchis method of estimating fluorine is described.
steps_raw: The isolation and identification of a material present in a typical vegetable carbon which interferes in Sanchis method of estimating fluorine is described.
